visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair and a pink top is seen in a close-up, applying a white mesh-like patch to her cheek. She looks surprised with wide eyes as the patch begins to interact with her skin. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a beauty tutorial. (2) The scene cuts to the woman wearing a patterned white and grey cardigan, holding up several purple boxes and bottles of BIOHEAL BOH PROBIODERM skincare products against a plain white wall. She points to the products enthusiastically. (3) Close-up shots of individual product packaging follow, showing a purple mist bottle and a jar of cream. The woman demonstrates spraying the mist onto her face, closing her eyes as the fine spray hits her skin. (4) She then demonstrates the application of the collagen patch again, showing how the white fibrous material dissolves into the skin when misted, leaving a transparent mesh that she eventually peels off. (5) Side-by-side comparison images appear, showing a 'before' shot of her skin looking slightly dull and an 'after' shot where her cheek has a noticeable 'lamp-like' glow. (6) The video transitions through various shots of her applying the serum and cream, massaging them into her face with gentle hand motions. (7) Finally, she addresses the camera directly, holding the product bundles and pointing toward the bottom of the screen where sales information is displayed.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 韓國&美國. [Subtitle]: 紅到不行？ (2) [Subtitle]: 一貼就融化的膠原蛋白貼片？ (3) [Subtitle]: Olive Young有一款. [Logo]: PROBIODERM. (4) [Subtitle]: 直接衝到第一名的產品. (5) [Subtitle]: BOH 抗皺緊緻系列. (6) [Subtitle]: 1. 先噴專用的膠原噴霧或擦精華. (7) [Subtitle]: 2. 打開包裝，把粉色保護層拿掉. (8) [Subtitle]: 3. 握住小小的手提邊，貼上去. (9) [Subtitle]: 4. 膠原蛋白會慢慢融在肌膚上. (10) [Subtitle]: 最後把網狀膜撕掉!!! [Variety]: 燈泡肌~! (11) [Subtitle]: 擦精華跟乳霜就完成了. (12) [Subtitle]: 膠原水91%噴霧. (13) [Subtitle]: 還有他們系列產品一起搭配! (14) [Subtitle]: (前/原相機) 不用擦! (15) [Subtitle]: (後/原相機) 直接貼一片就好! (16) [Subtitle]: 持續用下去之後. (17) [Subtitle]: 一層一層變得更穩. (18) [Subtitle]: 12/11~12/15 只開五天. (19) [Subtitle]: 3D貼片套組 目前只有90組. (20) [Subtitle]: 購買連結在我的IG主頁.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One female creator is the sole subject throughout the tutorial.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a pink camisole and later a patterned cardigan.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean indoor setting with white walls and a bedroom-like area where skincare products are displayed on a vanity.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-arousal, energetic female narration accompanied by a bright, mid-tempo acoustic guitar track. The speaker uses a friendly and highly animated tone to introduce the product. (2) A rhythmic sequence follows where the speaker's cadence matches the fast cuts of the video. The spray of a mist bottle creates a short, sharp 'whoosh' sound effect, marking a transition in the demo. (3) Subtle 'ding' and 'pop' SFX are layered over the music to emphasize key text overlays on the screen. The music remains consistent in volume and mood throughout. (4) The final segment features a more persuasive, urgent vocal delivery as the speaker details the limited-time group buy offer. The audio concludes with a cheerful sign-off and a final musical flourish.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Problem/Solution -> Proof -> Detailed Demo -> Scarcity/Offer -> CTA.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional commercial and tutorial for the BIOHEAL BOH melting collagen skincare line, specifically marketing a limited-edition group buy set to the creator's audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator provides an in-depth tutorial, explicitly names the brand and product line, shows prices, and includes a direct link in her social media profile for purchase.

high_inference.freeDescribe: This video utilizes high-density editing and a fast-paced narrative typical of social commerce, successfully blending educational content with promotional urgency.
